profile.headline: Backend Software Engineer | Java | Spring Boot | AWS
profile.summary: Backend Engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable APIs and cloud-native applications. Strong expertise in Java, Spring Boot, distributed systems, SQL databases, and AWS. Passionate about system design, reliability, and performance optimization.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer
description: Built microservices handling over 5 million transactions per month.
Reduced API latency by 35% through query optimization and caching.
Implemented monitoring and alerting using Prometheus and Grafana.

experience.title: Software Engineer
description: Developed REST APIs using Java and Spring Boot.
Worked with PostgreSQL and Redis for data-intensive applications.
Automated deployments using Docker and Kubernetes.

projects.name: Payment Processing Platform
projects.description: Developed scalable payment infrastructure processing 100K+ transactions daily.

projects.name: Cloud Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Built centralized monitoring solution for distributed systems.
